title: Real Estate Photo Editor Needed — High Volume, Bracketed Photos (Ongoing Work)
brief: We're a real estate media agency looking for a reliable photo editor to join our team for ongoing, high-volume work. **We do NOT need a photographer** — we shoot the photos ourselves and send you the RAW files. You handle the editing. What you'll be doing: - Editing bracketed (HDR) real estate photos — typically 3-5 exposures per shot that need to be blended - Standard real estate edits: window pulls, sky replacements, color correction, vertical/horizontal alignment, lawn enhancement, lens distortion correction, and general cleanup - Delivering high-quality, MLS-ready images with consistent style across each property - Turnaround time: 24-48 hours per listing Required experience: - Proven experience with bracketed/HDR blending (manual or via Photomatix, Aurora HDR, etc.) - Strong portfolio of real estate work — please share examples - Familiarity with Lightroom and Photoshop - Reliable communication and consistent turnaround Volume & pricing: - We need bulk pricing per image or per listing (please quote both) - Expect 20-40 photos per listing, multiple listings per week - Long-term relationship preferred — we want one go-to editor, not a rotating cast To apply, please include: 1. Portfolio or before/after samples (especially bracketed work) 2. Your bulk rate per image AND per listing (25-photo and 40-photo tiers) 3. Typical turnaround time 4. Software you use Looking forward to building a long-term partnership with the right editor. Thanks!
